title: astragalus reflexus
intro: Astragalus reflexus, also known as the Mongolian milkvetch or astragalus, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the legume family (Fabaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Astragalus reflexus include enhancing the immune system, reducing fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus reflexus can be consumed as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
